item.title: Trump leaves Republicans guessing on midterms plans as outlook darkens
item.description: The president is said to be eager to increase his involvement but has yet to approve a spending plan for his $300 million-plus war chest.

item.title: How two Bernie Sanders allies are trying to counter the online right
item.description: More Perfect Union, one of the fastest-growing YouTube channels, doesn’t look like most other online political content.

item.title: A Republican lawmaker embarks on his biggest showdown yet with Trump
item.description: Thomas Massie has challenged Trump on issues including the Epstein files and is trying to survive reelection in deep-red Kentucky.

item.title: Epstein’s lawyers asked CIA for records that could show affiliation with agency
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein’s lawyers filed records requests to the National Security Agency and the CIA, according to documents released by the Justice Departmen...

item.title: Trump plans to keep Democratic governors out of traditionally bipartisan meeting
item.description: The White House did not say why Democratic governors were not invited to the meeting with Trump. In addition, at least two Democrats were uninvited to...
